_synthetic_notice: Synthetic payer question set for demonstration.

payer.name: G-BA / IQWiG
payer.framing: Added benefit versus appropriate comparator therapy (zVT); patient-relevant endpoints prioritised.

questions.text: What is the added clinical benefit of rimcazumab versus the appropriate comparator therapy on skin clearance?
What proportion of patients achieve complete skin clearance (PASI 100 / IGA 0) and how durable is the response?
What is the effect on health-related quality of life (DLQI) in the target population?
What is the safety and tolerability profile, including serious infections, over 52 weeks?
Is trial efficacy reproduced in routine clinical practice, and what is treatment persistence?
What is the burden of moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis in the German population and the unmet need?
How does the maintenance dosing schedule affect adherence and administration burden?
What is the expected budget impact relative to the comparator over a 3-year horizon?
